title: cranichis engelii
intro: Cranichis engelii, also known as Engel's Lip Fern, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the orchid family. It is native to the Hawaiian Islands and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cranichis engelii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
